title: SolarEdge (SEDG) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards? - Nasdaq
text: SolarEdge Technologies Q1 2024 Earnings Preview. Market Conditions: Wall Street expected challenging results as SEDG had been witnessing a significant slowdown in demand for its products, with distributors facing persistent financial challenges. Revenue Impact: The distributor financial troubles were likely to have hurt the year-over-year sell-through of the company's optimizers and inverters and overall top-line performance. Positive Factors: Positive synergies from the Wevo acquisition, which SEDG completed in April 2024, were likely to boost second-quarter operating results. Additionally, improvement in warranty costs, reduced accrual rates, lower shipment costs, and the company's cost reduction initiatives were likely to have contributed favorably to the company's bottom line. Earnings Outlook: SEDG had an Earnings ESP of +5.13%, and the model predicted an earnings beat, as the combination of positive Earnings ESP and a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) increases the odds of an earnings beat.
